sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Withdraw ₳266,667 for Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer...
Stated amount: not stated in document

Deliverables: This treasury withdrawal funds Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer for Cardano which will provide the following services: Cexplorer.io is a high-performance, feature-rich blockchain explorer designed specifically for the Cardano ecosystem., It offers deep on-chain insights, real-time data access, and powerful tools for developers, stake pool operators, and users., With over 50,000 monthly users and millions of processed data requests, Cexplorer.io has become a trusted resource in the Cardano community., This proposal seeks funding to ensure the long-term sustainability of the platform through infrastructure maintenance and continuous improvement.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): This treasury withdrawal funds Cexplorer.io -- Developer-Focused Blockchain Explorer for Cardano which will provide the following services: Cexplorer.io is a high-performance, feature-rich blockchain explorer designed specifically for the Cardano ecosystem.
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): It offers deep on-chain insights, real-time data access, and powerful tools for developers, stake pool operators, and users.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, medium materiality): With over 50,000 monthly users and millions of processed data requests, Cexplorer.io has become a trusted resource in the Cardano community.

Claim (technical, independently_verifiable, high materiality): This proposal seeks funding to ensure the long-term sustainability of the platform through infrastructure maintenance and continuous improvement.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): This proposal aims to solve the following problem: The Cardano ecosystem lacks a powerful, developer-friendly explorer with advanced features, real-time insights, and flexible tools for building on-chain apps.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Cexplorer.io aims to fill this gap by providing deep data access, improved UX, and ongoing enhancements to support the growing needs of users and developers.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

decision_contract.composite_formula: 40% ecosystem benefit + 25% delivery confidence + 20% cost efficiency + 15% downside protection - 0.50
decision_contract.yes_rule: All quality floors, independently verified evidence, verified NCL, and portfolio capacity must pass.
decision_contract.no_rule: Requires affirmative independently verified waste/harm plus ecosystem benefit below 55%; missing evidence alone is never NO.
decision_contract.portfolio_gate: Verified on-chain Net Change Limit and opportunity-cost portfolio eligibility are mandatory for treasury direction.
